text_that_may_need_copy_forward: وافعل هذه الأفعال والأقوال في صلاتك كلها، ماعدا تكبيرة الإحرام، فإنها في الركعة الأولى دون غيرها من الركعات.
why_copy_forward_is_needed: This line governs more than the local fragment and may need to travel with earlier split excerpts it semantically controls.
what_other_excerpt_it_must_attach_to: Earlier instruction excerpts beginning from `إذا قمت إلى الصلاة ...` and the omitted acts it governs.
risk_if_not_copied: Earlier pieces appear complete while actually missing their governing repetition/exception statement.

why_copy_forward_is_needed: The exception only makes sense with the larger governed action set.
what_other_excerpt_it_must_attach_to: Any earlier excerpt that is being learned as part of the repeated prayer sequence.
risk_if_not_copied: The owner mis-scopes what repeats across rak'ahs.

why_copy_forward_is_needed: The scope phrase points backward and therefore may need explicit recovery of the governed earlier material.
what_other_excerpt_it_must_attach_to: The earlier action-and-saying excerpts it semantically names.
risk_if_not_copied: The owner guesses scope instead of receiving it from the library.

text_that_may_need_copy_forward: Identity framing that this is hadith explanation
why_copy_forward_is_needed: Detached fragments must still carry enough identity to prevent discourse-role confusion.
what_other_excerpt_it_must_attach_to: Any split excerpt derived from the explanatory chain.
